nasb.text: The tree snake will make its nest and lay eggs there, And it will hatch and gather them under its protection. Yes, the hawks will be gathered there, Every one with its kind.

esv.text: There the owl nests and lays and hatches and gathers her young in her shadow; indeed, there the hawks are gathered, each one with her mate.

cnv.text: 箭蛇要在那裡築窩、下蛋、 孵蛋，並且聚子在牠的陰影下； 鷂鷹也各與自己的伴偶， 聚集在那裡。

ccb.text: 猫头鹰要在那里做窝， 产卵，孵化， 把幼鸟保护在翅膀底下， 鸷鸟也成双成对地聚集在那里。

csbs.text: 猫头鹰要在那里筑窝、下蛋、孵化， 并在它的阴影下聚拢幼雏； 鹰隼也在那里各与自己的伴偶聚集。
